title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cyient Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cyient Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Cyient Capital India in Coimbatore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cyient Capital India:
Cyient Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cyient Capital India!
